rationale: Guidance specifies concrete file format support (CSV, PDF, Excel), performance targets (30 seconds for <5 million rows, 2 minutes for 5-50 million), and scheduled report generation (daily at 9 AM on weekdays, email to 5 recipients within 5 minutes). Acceptance criteria detail template selection, filtering, and export workflows. Access control requirements specified (department-based filtering with audit logging). Token reduction from replacing 'good control', 'improve', 'better' with specific technical capabilities and measured performance targets.
